oval.label: Oval
oval.description: An ideally proportioned face shape that suits most hairstyles.

styles.name: Layered Cut
Layered Cut
styles.reason: Natural volume enhances the balanced proportions of an oval face.

styles.name: Wavy Long
Wavy Long
styles.reason: Soft waves flow along the lines of an oval face, adding elegance.

styles.name: Short Pixie Cut
Short Pixie Cut
styles.reason: Exposes the balanced features as-is, giving a chic impression.

round.label: Round
round.description: A face shape where length and width are similar. Styles that elongate vertically work best.

styles.name: High-Layered Long
High-Layered Long
styles.reason: Crown volume makes the face appear longer and slimmer.

styles.name: Side-Part Straight
Side-Part Straight
styles.reason: A side part creates an asymmetric effect that slims the face.

styles.name: Shaggy Cut
Shaggy Cut
styles.reason: Irregular layers reduce face width and emphasize the vertical line.

square.label: Square
square.description: A face shape where forehead, cheekbones, and jaw have similar widths. Soft, curved styles suit it best.

styles.name: Soft Wave Medium
Soft Wave Medium
styles.reason: Gentle waves naturally soften the angular jawline for a feminine look.

styles.name: Side Bang Long
Side Bang Long
styles.reason: Side bangs cover the angular forehead, creating a softer impression.

styles.name: C-Curl Bob
C-Curl Bob
styles.reason: C-curls wrap gently around the jawline, softening angular features.

heart.label: Heart
heart.description: A face shape with a wide forehead and pointed chin. Styles that add volume at the lower half work best.

styles.name: Chin-Length Bob
Chin-Length Bob
styles.reason: Length that ends at the chin adds volume to the narrow jaw, balancing the face.

styles.name: Side-Part Wave
Side-Part Wave
styles.reason: A side part covers the wide forehead, while waves add volume at the lower face.

styles.name: Layered Medium
Layered Medium
styles.reason: Lower layers build volume around the jaw, naturally balancing the inverted triangle.

long.label: Long
long.description: A face shape taller than it is wide. Styles that add width horizontally suit it best.

styles.name: Volume Bob
Volume Bob
styles.reason: Side volume adds horizontal width to a long face, creating balance.

styles.name: Bang Medium
Bang Medium
styles.reason: Bangs cover the long forehead, reducing the perceived vertical length of the face.

styles.name: Curly Medium
Curly Medium
styles.reason: Full curls create horizontal volume, making a long face look more balanced.
